title: Lord of the Flies
overview: An old man bases his livelihood on a very bizarre form of recyling, breeding maggots in his yard, which he uses to feed his animals. This model of self-subsistence serves as his vision of a perfect state. Experimental documentary made during the collapse of the Soviet Union.

trailers.title: Povelitel Mukh (Lord of The Flies) Vladimir Tyulkin,1990
